sticky.welcome_win95: Welcome to Windows App Center v1.6.4!
sticky.welcome_modern: Welcome to Windows UI App Center v1.6.4!
sticky.games_hint: Check out the Games folder to get started.
sticky.ragdoll_hint: Please be kind to the ragdoll pet.
readme.vlrs:
VIRTUAL LIFE RESTART SIMULATOR
================================

Take control of a new life! Make choices, manage your stats, and see where your decisions take you.

Instructions:
- Use the mouse to interact with the UI.
- Make decisions carefully!
- Manage your health, wealth, and happiness.
readme.flappy:
FLAPPY NEON
===========

Navigate the neon bird through the pipes!

Instructions:
- Press SPACE or Click to jump.
- Avoid the pipes.
- Get the highest score!
readme.football:
FOOTBALL RUSH
=============

Run, dodge, and score!

Instructions:
- Use arrow keys to move.
- Press SPACE to kick/shoot.
readme.doom:
DOOM CLASSIC
============

The legendary 90s FPS.

Instructions:
- W/A/S/D to move.
- Click/Ctrl to shoot.
- Space to interact.
readme.tetris:
TETRIS TRYHARD
==============

Pure block-stacking action.

Instructions:
- Use arrow keys to move/rotate blocks.
- Space to drop.
readme.chapas:
CHAPAS PRIME
============

A 3D physics-based button football game (Chapas).

Instructions:
- Click and drag on your cap to aim and set power.
- Release to shoot!
- Score more goals than your opponent to win.
readme.nocturna:
NOCTURNA
========

El Jardín Silente - A procedural, atmospheric rhythm game.

Instructions:
- Connect flowing energy nodes matching the beat.
- Maintain your rhythm flow to blossom the quiet garden.
- Use keys or tap controls to interact with visual elements.
readme.gameboy:
H.I.P. GAME BOY EMULATOR
========================

A fully-featured Game Boy emulator in 3D using Three.js and WebGL.

Instructions:
- Load ROM files (.gb) directly into the virtual cartridge slot.
- Use customizable keyboard binds to play GB classics.
- Modify video/render options in the system preferences panel.
